title: Why Shares of Universal Health Services Spiked 30% This Week
text: The hospital and behavioral health company grew revenue but saw earnings per share drop.

title: Universal Health (UHS) Q3 Earnings Top on Better Patient Volumes
text: Universal Health's (UHS) third-quarter results reflect growing patient admissions at its segments. However, margins are hurt by escalated labor costs.

title: Universal Health Services, Inc. (UHS) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Steve Filton - Chief Financial Officer Marc Miller - President and Chief Executive Officer Conference Call Participants Kevin Fischbeck - Bank of America Ann Hynes - Mizuho Group Justin Lake - Wolfe Research Jason Cassorla - Citi A.J. Rice - Credit Suisse Andrew Mok - UBS Stephen Baxter - Wells Fargo Whit Mayo - SVB Securities Gary Taylor - Cowen Pito Chickering - Deutsche Bank Sarah James - Barclays Operator Good day and thank you for standing by.

title: Universal Health Services Q3 results beat estimates, stock rockets higher
text: Universal Health Services Inc. UHS, +3.90% jumped 12% after hours after the hospital and health-facility operator reported third-quarter results that beat estimates. The company reported net income of $182.8 million, or $2.50 a share, compared with $2.60 a share, during the third quarter of 2021.

title: 4 Stocks Navigating Through Hospital Industry Headwinds (Revised)
text: Increasing expenses amid inflation is shrinking margins for the Zacks Medical-Hospital industry players. However, HCA Healthcare (HCA), Acadia Healthcare (ACHC), Universal Health (UHS) and Tenet Healthcare (THC) are poised to win big with recovering patient volumes.

title: Universal Health (UHS) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Universal Health's (UHS) Q3 results are likely to reflect sound segmental performances resulting from a constant pursuit of expansion moves. However, high labor costs might partly offset the results.

title: 4 Stocks Navigating Through Hospital Industry Headwinds
text: Increasing expenses amid inflation is shrinking margins for the Zacks Medical-Hospital industry players. However, HCA Healthcare (HCA), Acadia Healthcare (ACHC), Universal Health (UHS) and Tenet Healthcare (THC) are poised to win big with recovering patient volumes.

title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. ANNOUNCES DATE FOR THIRD QUARTER 2022 EARNINGS RELEASE AND CONFERENCE CALL
text: KING OF PRUSSIA, Pa. , Oct. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) announced today that it will report results for its third quarter ended September 30, 2022, after the market closes on Tuesday, October 25, 2022.
